title: Welcome
content: Welcome to Polyglot Analyzer. Our mission is to provide a 'Pull & Play' experience for understanding complex codebase dependencies across SQL, Python, and JavaScript/TypeScript.

title: Core Engine
content: The system maps entities across 4 layers: Database → Backend → API → Frontend. This allows tracing the impact of a database schema change all the way to the UI components that consume it.

title: Zero-Config Sync
content: No manual configuration is required for your team. The system uses a centralized backend API for auto-discovery and persists your preferences (like Dev Mode) in localStorage.

title: Debug Dashboard
content: The Dev Mode provides a real-time grid dashboard showing graph metrics, connectivity status, and raw entity data for deep-dive analysis.
